message.content:
### 1. Overall Layout Structure  
The screen follows a **vertical, single-column layout** with three primary sections:  
- **Header Bar** (top, 56dp height)  
- **Synopsis Section** (middle, ~60% of screen height)  
- **Download Links Section** (bottom, ~30% of screen height)  
Sections are separated by thin, dark gray dividers (1dp height). The background is a deep navy blue (#1A2332) with subtle contrast between sections (Synopsis: #1E293B, Download Links: #1A2332).  


### 2. Status Bar  
- **Time**: "9:06" (white, bold, 14sp)  
- **Icons**:  
  - Battery: 100% (white, 16x16dp)  
  - Signal: 4G (white, 16x16dp)  
  - Wi-Fi: Connected (white, 16x16dp)  
  - Notifications: Bell (white, 16x16dp)  
  - Mobile data: 4KB/s (white, 16x16dp)  
- **Background**: White (matches the header bar).  


### 3. Navigation/Header Bar  
- **Height**: 56dp  
- **Background**: White  
- **Elements (left to right)**:  
  - **Back Arrow**: White, 24x24dp, left-aligned (8dp padding).  
  - **URL Bar**: Rounded rectangle (16dp corner radius), white background, gray text ("ysflix.com/movie/shoguns"), 14sp, centered (16dp padding).  
  - **Add Tab**: White plus icon, 24x24dp, right of URL bar (8dp padding).  
  - **Bookmark**: White bookmark icon, 24x24dp (8dp padding).  
  - **More Options**: White three-dot menu, 24x24dp, right-aligned (8dp padding).  


### 4. Movie Poster  
- **Not Visible**: The screenshot focuses on text-based content (Synopsis/Download Links), so no poster is present.  


### 5. Movie Title  
- **Text**: "Shogun's Ninja (2025)"  
- **Font**: Sans-serif (e.g., Roboto), bold, 18sp  
- **Color**: White (#FFFFFF)  
- **Position**: Top of the Synopsis section, 16dp from the top, left-aligned.  


### 6. Rating Display  
- **Text**: "IMDb Rating (6.4)"  
- **Font**: Sans-serif, regular, 14sp  
- **Color**: Light gray (#9CA3AF)  
- **Position**: Below the title, 8dp spacing.  


### 7. Genre Tags  
- **Not Visible**: No genre tags are present in the Synopsis section (metadata is listed as text below).  


### 8. Metadata Section  
- **Layout**: Vertical list of key-value pairs, left-aligned, 16dp padding.  
- **Elements**:  
  - **File size**: "File size... (820 MB)" (gray text, 12sp)  
  - **Quality**: "Quality... WEB-DL 720p" (gray text, 12sp)  
  - **Format**: "Format... mp4" (gray text, 12sp)  
  - **Genre**: "Genre... Action,History" (gray text, 12sp)  
  - **Duration**: "Duration... 01:16:44" (gray text, 12sp)  
  - **Subtitle**: "Subtitle... Myanmar Subtitle (Hardsub)" (gray text, 12sp)  
- **Styling**: Labels (e.g., "File size...") are bold, values (e.g., "820 MB") are regular.  


### 9. Download Section  
- **Header**: "Download Links" (white, bold, 16sp, 16dp padding).  
- **Table**: 5 rows (No, Server Name, Size, Quality, Resolution) with:  
  - **Columns**:  
    - "No": 1-5 (white, 12sp, center-aligned)  
    - "Server Name": "Yoteshin", "Megaup", etc. (green, 12sp, left-aligned)  
    - "Size": "820 MB" (green, 12sp, center-aligned)  
    - "Quality": "WEB-DL" (green, 12sp, center-aligned)  
    - "Resolution": "720p" (green, 12sp, center-aligned)  
  - **Row Height**: 48dp  
  - **Divider**: 1dp gray line between rows.  
- **Styling**: Server names are green (#10B981) to indicate links; other columns are white.  


### 10. Video Player / Trailer Area  
- **Not Visible**: No video player or trailer is present (the screen is a static webpage).  


### 11. Color Scheme  
- **Primary Background**: Deep navy blue (#1A2332)  
- **Section Backgrounds**:  
  - Synopsis: Slightly lighter navy (#1E293B)  
  - Download Links: Darker navy (#1A2332)  
- **Text Colors**:  
  - Headings: White (#FFFFFF)  
  - Body: Light gray (#9CA3AF)  
  - Links (Server Names): Green (#10B981)  
- **Accent Color**: Green (#10B981) for clickable elements.  


### 12. Card/Section Backgrounds, Borders, Shadows  
- **Sections**: Rounded rectangles (8dp corner radius) with subtle shadows (0dp y-offset, 2dp blur, 10% opacity) to separate content.  
- **Dividers**: 1dp gray lines between sections and table rows.  


### 13. Icons, Dividers, Spacing  
- **Icons**: Minimal (back arrow, bookmark, menu) – all white, 24x24dp.  
- **Dividers**: 1dp gray lines (between sections, table rows).  
- **Spacing**:  
  - Vertical: 16dp between header and Synopsis, 16dp between Synopsis and Download Links.  
  - Horizontal: 16dp padding inside all sections.  
  - Text: 8dp line height between metadata items.  


### 14. Bottom Navigation or Action Buttons  
- **Not Visible**: The screen shows a web browser (Chrome) with standard Android navigation:  
  - **Back**: Triangle (white, 24x24dp)  
  - **Home**: Circle (white, 24x24dp)  
  - **Recent Apps**: Square (white, 24x24dp)  


### 15. Scroll Indicators or Other UI Elements  
- **Not Visible**: No scroll indicators (the content fits within the screen, or the browser hides them).  


### Typography Summary  
- **Headings**: Bold, 16-18sp, white.  
- **Body**: Regular, 12-14sp, light gray.  
- **Links**: Regular, 12sp, green.  
- **Font Family**: Sans-serif (e.g., Roboto) for consistency.  


This breakdown captures all visual elements, spacing, and styling for precise recreation.
